corp_major_001.title: Open Fraud
corp_major_001.body: Your chief financial officer wants to cook the quarter's numbers. He swears no one will notice. Do you approve it?
corp_major_001.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_001.outcome_yes_body: The scheme blows up in the company's face. Game over.
corp_major_001.outcome_no_body: You avoid the worst and pressure from regulators returns to 50.

corp_major_002.title: Impossible Promise
corp_major_002.body: You can announce a huge target to reassure investors, but you know it will be very hard to deliver. Do you announce it?
corp_major_002.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_002.outcome_yes_body: You announce something you will not be able to deliver. Investor confidence is cut in half. For 12 cards, the card message appears without vowels.
corp_major_002.outcome_no_body: You stay credible and investors return to 50. For 12 cards, the card message appears without vowels.

corp_major_003.title: Brutal Layoff Plan
corp_major_003.body: One executive suggests laying off a massive number of employees this week to reassure the markets. Do you let him do it?
corp_major_003.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_003.outcome_yes_body: You abandon your teams. Employees drop by half. For 12 cards, the choices appear without vowels.
corp_major_003.outcome_no_body: You stop this damage and employees return to 50. For 12 cards, the choices appear without vowels.

corp_major_004.title: Misleading Campaign
corp_major_004.body: The marketing department wants to promise the public a product much better than it really is. Do you approve the campaign?
corp_major_004.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_004.outcome_yes_body: You approve a misleading campaign. Brand image is cut in half. For 12 cards, the card message appears reversed.
corp_major_004.outcome_no_body: You refuse that lie and brand image returns to 50. For 12 cards, the card message appears reversed.

corp_major_005.title: Inspection Incoming
corp_major_005.body: The regulators will arrive soon. Your team wants to urgently hide what is wrong instead of fixing it. Do you agree?
corp_major_005.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_005.outcome_yes_body: You choose to hide instead of fix. The regulators sanction you and the relationship drops by half. For 12 cards, the choices appear reversed.
corp_major_005.outcome_no_body: You impose a real cleanup. Regulators return to 50. For 12 cards, the choices appear reversed.

corp_major_006.title: Overly Optimistic Announcement
corp_major_006.body: To push the stock back up, you are being urged to oversell the company's outlook. Do you go for it?
corp_major_006.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_006.outcome_yes_body: The trust bubble bursts. Investors lose half their support.
corp_major_006.outcome_no_body: You stay realistic and confidence returns to 50.

corp_major_007.title: Factory Under Strain
corp_major_007.body: The main site is at its limit. You can push production a little more, but if it breaks the consequences will be severe. Do you push it?
corp_major_007.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_007.outcome_yes_body: You push it to the breaking point. Game over.
corp_major_007.outcome_no_body: You slow down before it breaks. Employees return to 50.

corp_major_008.title: Online Backlash
corp_major_008.body: A controversy is escalating fast. Your team wants to respond aggressively to intimidate critics. Do you follow them?
corp_major_008.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_008.outcome_yes_body: You feed the fire. Brand image drops by half.
corp_major_008.outcome_no_body: You calm the tone and brand image returns to 50.

corp_major_009.title: Hide an Accident
corp_major_009.body: An internal incident can still be handled discreetly, but only if you act properly right away. Do you disclose everything?
corp_major_009.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_009.outcome_yes_body: You handle it cleanly and regulators return to 50.
corp_major_009.outcome_no_body: The lie comes out later. Employees lose half their trust.

corp_major_010.title: Deceptive Advertising
corp_major_010.body: An agency offers a very effective campaign, but it is clearly deceptive. Do you sign off on it?
corp_major_010.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_010.outcome_yes_body: The campaign works for a moment and then turns against you. Regulators get involved.
corp_major_010.outcome_no_body: You refuse the trap and regulators return to 50.

corp_major_011.title: Sell an Illusion
corp_major_011.body: Your team wants to promise a product revolution that does not exist yet. Do you agree to sell empty dreams?
corp_major_011.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_011.outcome_yes_body: You sell an empty promise. Brand image loses half its value.
corp_major_011.outcome_no_body: You refuse to sell something fake and brand image returns to 50.

corp_major_012.title: Salary Freeze
corp_major_012.body: To protect margins, you are being offered a hard salary freeze despite very strong results. Do you do it?
corp_major_012.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_012.outcome_yes_body: The teams take the signal very badly. Employees drop by half.
corp_major_012.outcome_no_body: You avoid the break and employees return to 50.

corp_major_013.title: Brand Overhaul
corp_major_013.body: You can change everything visually to make people forget the latest criticism, but the risk of looking ridiculous is real. Do you launch it?
corp_major_013.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_013.outcome_yes_body: You launch a giant smokescreen and brand image drops by half.
corp_major_013.outcome_no_body: You refuse this coat of paint and brand image returns to 50.

corp_major_014.title: Toxic Public Relations
corp_major_014.body: A lobbyist promises to calm the authorities in his own way. Do you let him negotiate in the shadows?
corp_major_014.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_014.outcome_yes_body: You let a dirty arrangement take root. Regulators drop by half.
corp_major_014.outcome_no_body: You refuse this shadow negotiation and regulators return to 50.

corp_major_015.title: Dividend Distribution
corp_major_015.body: Investors want to be paid quickly, while the company still needs breathing room. Do you distribute dividends anyway?
corp_major_015.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_015.outcome_yes_body: You give in to short-term thinking and investor confidence drops by half.
corp_major_015.outcome_no_body: You stand firm and investors return to 50.

corp_major_016.title: Dangerous Product
corp_major_016.body: The launch could bring in a lot of money, but several warning signs say it is legally too risky. Do you release it anyway?
corp_major_016.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_016.outcome_yes_body: The product triggers a major crisis. Game over.
corp_major_016.outcome_no_body: You stop the bomb before it explodes. Regulators return to 50.

corp_major_017.title: Abnormal Turnover
corp_major_017.body: Resignations are piling up across several key teams. Do you stop everything to understand why before moving on?
corp_major_017.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_017.outcome_yes_body: You trace the problem back to its source. Employees return to 50.
corp_major_017.outcome_no_body: You ignore the warning and the teams empty out. Their confidence drops by half.

corp_major_018.title: Change the Story
corp_major_018.body: The communications department proposes a flattering story that is far from reality to save the company's image. Do you approve it?
corp_major_018.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_018.outcome_yes_body: The public senses the fake. Brand image is cut in half.
corp_major_018.outcome_no_body: You go back to something credible. Brand image returns to 50.

corp_major_019.title: Full Cooperation with Authorities
corp_major_019.body: You can open everything up to regulators to settle several issues at once, even if it hurts in the short term. Do you cooperate?
corp_major_019.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_019.outcome_yes_body: You rebuild on a healthier foundation. Regulators return to 50.
corp_major_019.outcome_no_body: You prolong the distrust. Regulators lose half their confidence again.

corp_major_020.title: Unrealistic Goal
corp_major_020.body: You are being pushed to promise impossible growth to save the stock price. Do you announce that number?
corp_major_020.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_020.outcome_yes_body: You announce an impossible number and investors lose half their support.
corp_major_020.outcome_no_body: You refuse the bluff and investors return to 50.

corp_major_021.title: Pressure on Teams
corp_major_021.body: A manager wants results at any cost, even if it breaks several teams in the process. Do you let him do it?
corp_major_021.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_021.outcome_yes_body: The teams fall apart. Employees drop by half.
corp_major_021.outcome_no_body: You cut off that destructive logic. Employees return to 50.

corp_major_022.title: Complete Rebranding
corp_major_022.body: You can start again with a clearer new identity, or keep piling on corrections. Do you start from scratch?
corp_major_022.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_022.outcome_yes_body: You clean up the confusion and brand image returns to 50.
corp_major_022.outcome_no_body: The brand stays unclear. Its image loses half its strength.

corp_major_023.title: Disclose Everything
corp_major_023.body: Several regulatory issues can be clarified now, at the cost of one major difficult moment. Do you choose transparency?
corp_major_023.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_023.outcome_yes_body: You clear out several files at once. Regulators return to 50.
corp_major_023.outcome_no_body: You pile up the risks. Investors drop by half.

corp_major_024.title: Bend the Rules
corp_major_024.body: A lawyer offers you a highly profitable gray area. Technically, it is not forbidden yet. Do you go into it?
corp_major_024.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_024.outcome_yes_body: The gray area turns into a black problem. Regulators lose half their confidence.
corp_major_024.outcome_no_body: You refuse the elegant trap. Regulators return to 50.

corp_major_025.title: Communication with the Markets
corp_major_025.body: You can take the time to explain a difficult period, or let rumors do the work. Do you explain it clearly?
corp_major_025.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_025.outcome_yes_body: You reassure people without lying. Investors return to 50.
corp_major_025.outcome_no_body: Silence is costly. Investors are cut in half.

corp_major_026.title: Overload the Teams
corp_major_026.body: You can hit the deadlines by pushing the teams even harder, but they are already near the breaking point. Do you push anyway?
corp_major_026.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_026.outcome_yes_body: You push teams that are already exhausted. Employees lose half their stability.
corp_major_026.outcome_no_body: You refuse that overload and employees return to 50.

corp_major_027.title: Widespread Lie
corp_major_027.body: Your executive committee wants to coordinate a false story across the whole company to hide several problems at once. Do you go along with it?
corp_major_027.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_027.outcome_yes_body: The lie becomes structural and everything collapses. Game over.
corp_major_027.outcome_no_body: You refuse the reckless escape forward. Brand image returns to 50.

corp_major_028.title: Overconfident Lawyer
corp_major_028.body: A law firm claims it can delay several cases with the authorities. It is tempting, but you sense the illusion. Do you sign?
corp_major_028.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_028.outcome_yes_body: You buy time, not trust. Regulators drop by half.
corp_major_028.outcome_no_body: You choose a cleaner path. Regulators return to 50.

corp_major_029.title: Restore Clarity
corp_major_029.body: The markets no longer understand the strategy. Do you simplify your plan and commit to a clearer direction?
corp_major_029.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_029.outcome_yes_body: You become understandable again. Investors return to 50.
corp_major_029.outcome_no_body: The confusion remains total. Investors lose half their confidence.

corp_major_030.title: Toxic Manager
corp_major_030.body: One executive delivers the numbers, but destroys everything around him. Do you finally remove him?
corp_major_030.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_030.outcome_yes_body: You send a clear signal. Employees return to 50.
corp_major_030.outcome_no_body: You let that toxic manager destroy the rest. Employees drop by half.

corp_major_031.title: Brand Promise
corp_major_031.body: The brand promises more than it delivers. Do you finally cut back the slogans so they match reality?
corp_major_031.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_031.outcome_yes_body: You realign the message and reality. Brand image returns to 50.
corp_major_031.outcome_no_body: You keep a gap that has become dangerous. Brand image loses half its value.

corp_major_032.title: Internal Control
corp_major_032.body: You can launch a real internal review now, or wait longer. Do you launch the full audit?
corp_major_032.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_032.outcome_yes_body: You get breathing room before the storm. Regulators return to 50.
corp_major_032.outcome_no_body: You let the risks grow. Regulators lose half their confidence.

corp_major_033.title: Poorly Prepared Acquisition
corp_major_033.body: An acquisition may please people in the short term, but everything suggests it is poorly prepared. Do you block it?
corp_major_033.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_033.outcome_yes_body: You block that poorly prepared acquisition and investors return to 50.
corp_major_033.outcome_no_body: You let a shaky deal move forward. Investors drop by half.

corp_major_034.title: Truth Meeting
corp_major_034.body: You can speak frankly to your teams about the real situation, or keep going with vague speeches. Do you play it straight?
corp_major_034.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_034.outcome_yes_body: You rebuild a useful connection. Employees return to 50.
corp_major_034.outcome_no_body: The discomfort grows. Employees lose half their trust.

corp_major_035.title: Marketing Influence
corp_major_035.body: The marketing department wants to pressure a local authority through image channels. Do you stop them?
corp_major_035.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_035.outcome_yes_body: You avoid mixing things that should stay separate. Brand image returns to 50.
corp_major_035.outcome_no_body: The authority notices and the relationship sharply deteriorates.

corp_major_036.title: Opaque Procedure
corp_major_036.body: One internal procedure is so unclear that it could become an issue with the authorities. Do you rewrite it right away?
corp_major_036.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_036.outcome_yes_body: You rewrite that procedure before it blows up. Regulators return to 50.
corp_major_036.outcome_no_body: You let the opacity continue. Regulators lose half their confidence.

corp_major_037.title: Speech to Investors
corp_major_037.body: You can give a sober and consistent speech, or let speculation tell the future in your place. Do you speak up?
corp_major_037.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_037.outcome_yes_body: You restore a readable direction. Investors return to 50.
corp_major_037.outcome_no_body: The void fills with rumors. Investors drop by half.

corp_major_038.title: Impossible Targets
corp_major_038.body: The teams are chasing impossible targets. Do you remove some of them to get back to reality?
corp_major_038.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_038.outcome_yes_body: You bring the targets back to reality. Employees return to 50.
corp_major_038.outcome_no_body: You let impossible targets wear everyone down. Employees lose half their energy.

corp_major_039.title: Promise to the Public
corp_major_039.body: You can refocus the whole brand around one credible promise, or keep promising everything to everyone. Do you refocus it?
corp_major_039.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_039.outcome_yes_body: You become understandable again. Brand image returns to 50.
corp_major_039.outcome_no_body: You stay vague and the public tunes out. Brand image drops by half.

corp_major_040.title: Systemic Corruption
corp_major_040.body: One executive proposes a discreet system to buy long-term regulatory peace. You know it is extremely serious. Do you accept?
corp_major_040.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
corp_major_040.outcome_yes_body: You turn the company into a ticking time bomb. Game over.
corp_major_040.outcome_no_body: You refuse to cross the line. Regulators return to 50.
